data.name: Label.MetaTitle.Help.Post
data.value: Max 60 characters. Defaults to post title if left blank.

data.name: Label.MetaTitle.Help.Category
data.value: Max 60 characters. Defaults to category name if left blank.

data.name: Label.MetaDescription.Placeholder
data.value: A short description for search engines (optional)…

data.name: Label.MetaDescription.Help.Post
data.value: Max 160 characters. Defaults to excerpt if left blank.

data.name: Label.MetaDescription.Help.Blog
data.value: Max 160 characters. Used in search engine results.

data.name: Label.MetaDescription.Blog.Placeholder
data.value: A short description of your blog for search engines…

data.name: Label.Excerpt.Placeholder
data.value: A short summary of the post (optional)…

data.name: Label.Excerpt.Help
data.value: Max 500 characters. Displayed in post listings.

data.name: Label.Slug.Help.Create
data.value: Auto-generated from title. Click ✎ to edit manually.

data.name: Label.Slug.Help.Edit
data.value: URL of this post. Change carefully — may break existing links.

data.name: Validation.MaxLength
data.value: This field exceeds the maximum length.

data.name: Validation.PasswordMismatch
data.value: The password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: Validation.SubdomainFormat
data.value: Subdomain may only contain letters, digits, and hyphens.

data.name: Page.Title.Landing.Home
data.value: Blogify — Your story. Your blog. Your way.

data.name: Page.Meta.Landing.Description
data.value: Blogify is a free multi-tenant blogging platform. Create your own blog on a custom subdomain, pick your theme, and start publishing — no technical setup required.

data.name: Message.NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Message.SlugTaken
data.value: This slug is already in use for this blog.

data.name: Message.SubdomainTaken
data.value: This subdomain is already taken. Please choose another.

data.name: Message.CategorySlugTaken
data.value: A category with this slug already exists for this blog.

data.name: Message.CategoryNameTaken
data.value: A category with this name already exists for this blog.

data.name: Message.UnableToDetermineUser
data.value: Unable to determine the current user. Please sign in again.

data.name: Message.CannotDeleteOwnAccount
data.value: You cannot delete your own account.

data.name: Message.SlugChangeWarning
data.value: Changing this URL will break any inbound links. Are you sure?

data.name: Identity.ConcurrencyFailure
data.value: Optimistic concurrency failure: the object has been modified.

data.name: Identity.LoginAlreadyAssociated
data.value: A user with this login already exists.

data.name: Identity.InvalidUserName
data.value: User name '{0}' is invalid; it may only contain letters or digits.

data.name: Identity.UserAlreadyHasPassword
data.value: User already has a password set.

data.name: Identity.UserLockoutNotEnabled
data.value: Lockout is not enabled for this user.

data.name: Identity.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Passwords must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Passwords must have at least one non-alphanumeric character.

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9').

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Passwords must have at least one lowercase ('a'-'z').

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresUniqueChars
data.value: Passwords must use at least {0} different characters.

data.name: Index.Hero.Heading
data.value: Your story. Your blog. Your way.

data.name: Index.Hero.Subheading
data.value: Blogify is a free multi-tenant blogging platform. Create your own blog on a custom subdomain, pick your theme, and start publishing — no technical setup required.

data.name: Index.Features.Subdomain.Description
data.value: Claim your own subdomain (e.g. myblog.blogify.com) instantly. Your blog, your address.

data.name: Index.Features.Themes.Description
data.value: Choose from three polished themes — Default, Minimal, and Aurora — and switch anytime.

data.name: Index.Features.Categories.Description
data.value: Organise your posts with custom categories to help readers find what they love.

data.name: Index.Features.Editor.Description
data.value: Write beautifully with a full-featured editor that supports formatting, images, and embeds.

data.name: Index.Features.Media.Description
data.value: Upload, manage, and reuse images and files across all your posts from one central library.

data.name: Index.Features.Markdown.Description
data.value: Write in Markdown or use the visual editor — Blogify supports both so you stay in flow.

data.name: Index.HowItWorks.Step1.Description
data.value: Sign up in seconds with just your email and a password. No credit card needed.

data.name: Index.HowItWorks.Step2.Title
data.value: Name your blog and pick a subdomain

data.name: Index.HowItWorks.Step2.Description
data.value: Choose a unique subdomain and give your blog a title that reflects your voice.

data.name: Index.HowItWorks.Step3.Description
data.value: Head straight to your admin panel and publish your first post to the world.

data.name: Index.Stats.BeFirst
data.value: Be the first to create a blog on Blogify!

data.name: Index.CTA.Description
data.value: Create your free blog today and be part of a growing community of writers, creators, and thinkers.

data.name: Message.UploadConstraints
data.value: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP · max 10 MB per file

data.name: Message.UploadFirstFile
data.value: Upload your first file using the Add New Media button above.

data.name: Message.SelectFileForDetails
data.value: Select a file to view its details.

data.name: Message.UploadFileRequired
data.value: Please select a file to upload.

data.name: Placeholder.AltText
data.value: Describe this image for screen readers…

data.name: Message.ConfirmDeleteMediaDetail
data.value: Delete '{0}'? Posts using this as cover image will lose their cover.

data.name: Media.Picker.NoPreview
data.value: Select an image to preview it here.

data.name: Media.Picker.DropOrBrowse
data.value: Drop images here or click to browse

data.name: Media.Picker.UploadConstraints
data.value: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP · max 10 MB per file

data.name: Media.Picker.InvalidType
data.value: Not allowed — only JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP.

data.name: Media.Detail.DeleteConfirmBody
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete '{0}'? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Media.Detail.DeleteConfirmUsed
data.value: This file is used as the cover image in {0} post(s). Deleting it will cause those posts to show a broken image.

data.name: Message.Posts.Empty
data.value: You haven't written any posts yet.

data.name: Auth.ForgotPassword.Confirmation
data.value: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

data.name: Dashboard.NoBlogs
data.value: You don't have any blogs yet.

data.name: BlogAdmin.Members.InviteNote
data.value: An invitation email will be sent to the address you provide.

data.name: BlogAdmin.Members.RemoveConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

data.name: BlogAdmin.Members.Error.AlreadyOwner
data.value: This user is the blog owner.

data.name: BlogAdmin.Members.Error.AlreadyMember
data.value: This user is already a member.

data.name: Landing.Hero.Note
data.value: A focused publishing studio for independent creators.

data.name: Landing.Hero.Heading
data.value: Make a place for your ideas.

data.name: Landing.Hero.Copy
data.value: Write without distraction, publish to a home that feels yours, and learn what brings readers back. No technical setup required.

data.name: Landing.Preview.Title
data.value: The quiet work behind a clear idea

data.name: Landing.Preview.Copy
data.value: Good writing begins long before the first sentence. It starts by noticing what deserves your attention.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Write.Copy
data.value: A calm editor, thoughtful organization, and a workflow built around the next sentence rather than admin chores.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Publish.Copy
data.value: Choose a polished theme, claim your address, and publish a blog that is ready to share from day one.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Understand.Copy
data.value: See the posts and sources earning attention, then use that signal to decide what deserves another chapter.

data.name: Landing.Examples.Copy
data.value: Start polished, then shape the presentation around your voice.

data.name: Landing.Process.Title
data.value: From first thought to public address.

data.name: Dashboard.CreateBlog.SubdomainHelp
data.value: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

data.name: Categories.Empty.Copy
data.value: Categories help readers find related writing as your blog grows.

data.name: Categories.Form.CreateDescription
data.value: Create a clear topic that helps readers explore related writing.

data.name: Categories.Form.EditDescription
data.value: Refine how this topic appears to readers and in search.

data.name: Categories.Form.DetailsDescription
data.value: Name the topic and choose the address used in links.

data.name: Categories.Form.SearchSharingDescription
data.value: Shape how this category appears in search results and link previews.

data.name: Categories.Form.NameHelp
data.value: Use a short topic readers will recognize.

data.name: Categories.Form.SlugHelpCreate
data.value: Generated from the name until you edit it. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

data.name: Categories.Form.SlugHelpEdit
data.value: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Changing this may break existing links.

data.name: Settings.PublicLanguage.Description
data.value: Choose the language readers see in navigation, dates, comments, and other theme interface text.

data.name: Settings.PublicLanguage.TurkishHelp
data.value: Show the public blog interface in Turkish.

data.name: Settings.PublicLanguage.EnglishHelp
data.value: Show the public blog interface in English.

data.name: Themes.Description
data.value: Each theme gives the same writing a distinct rhythm. Change it any time.

data.name: Themes.Default.Description
data.value: A confident publication layout that gives the newest story room to lead.

data.name: Themes.Minimal.Description
data.value: A quiet, text-first reading experience for essays, notes, and focused writing.

data.name: Themes.Aurora.Description
data.value: An image-led layout with bold pacing for visual stories and varied topics.

data.name: Blog.NoCategories
data.value: No topics have been added yet.

data.name: Blog.NoPosts
data.value: No stories have been published yet.

data.name: Blog.NoCategoryPosts
data.value: No stories have been published in this topic yet.

data.name: Blog.NoComments
data.value: No comments yet. Start the conversation.

data.name: Blog.InvalidParentComment
data.value: The comment you are replying to is no longer available.
